steps.name: create-branch

steps.name: check-deps

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize task folder structure including assets/predictions/{arm-a,arm-b}.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: this resample reuses methodology already established in t0027.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information needed for a power-driven resample.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0027 fault-tolerant arm-B harness, t0021 Plan-and-Solve v2, t0010 paired library.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Pre-register sampling rule, cost cap guardrail, and McNemar analysis plan.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only execution against the API; no remote compute.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run arms A and B with the cap guardrail and persist predictions assets and costs.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: locked constraints from brainstorm session 8 leave no design choices.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Compute McNemar verdict (full or partial), per-subset breakdown, write results files.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no comparable published baselines for this paired resample.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for RQ2 calibrator, RQ3 instrumentation, RQ5 C rebuild.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final reporting: PR, merge, overview refresh.
